equipment.name: The Shifting Blade
equipment.description: A runic greatsword that can reconfigure its elemental affinity. A gift from Phaidros.

equipment.name: Paired Shortswords
equipment.description: A matched set of short blades for dual-wielding.

equipment.name: Earth Gauntlets
equipment.description: Ancient gauntlets imbued with the power of the earth.

equipment.name: Wooden Helmet
equipment.description: A simple helmet carved from hardwood.

equipment.name: Wooden Chestplate
equipment.description: A basic chestplate of layered wood panels.

equipment.name: Wooden Gauntlets
equipment.description: Simple hand guards made from shaped wood.

equipment.name: Tactical Chronometer
equipment.description: A precision device that manipulates turn order.

equipment.name: Poison Vial
equipment.description: A vial of potent poison. Apply to weapons to envenom attacks.

equipment.name: Hookshot
equipment.description: A mechanical grappling device that pulls distant enemies close.
